vulnerability.reason: Generated describes inability to detect misalignment causing false expectations, matching the trust-based sensitivity.
vulnerability.reference: Shoppers trust virtual try-on images as accurate, but pose-garment misalignment creates false expectations.
vulnerability.generated: Shoppers and retailers rely entirely on generated try-on visuals for fit decisions, lacking ground-truth or tools to detect garment-pose misalignment.

impact.reason: All referenced damages (returns, dissatisfaction, retailer credibility loss) are explicitly present.
impact.reference: Increased product returns, consumer dissatisfaction, loss of retailer credibility.
impact.generated: High product return rates, consumer dissatisfaction, and eroded trust in virtual try-on experiences and retailer credibility.

dose_response.reason: Causal arc misalignment→reliance/trust→returns/eroded trust is semantically identical, despite added detail about detection tools.
dose_response.reference: Conditionally-controlled generation misaligns garment to pose; shoppers trust try-on images as accurate, creating expectation-reality gaps that increase returns and erode retailer credibility.
dose_response.generated: Conditionally-controlled consistency generation producing misaligned images, through online shoppers and retailers evaluating virtual try-on results, triggers complete reliance on generated visuals without detection tools, leading to high return rates, dissatisfaction, and eroded trust.
